# IconSecurity.IsValidIconSrc method

Returns `true` when *src* passes [`ValidateIconSrc`](./ValidateIconSrc.md) without throwing (AC-20.21, AC-20.22).

```csharp
public static bool IsValidIconSrc(string src)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| src | The icon source URI to test. |

## Return Value

`true` when the scheme is `https:` or `data:`; otherwise `false`.
